commit.message:
feat: add 6 new engine subsystem modules with integration tests

Introduces six new runtime subsystem modules to the franken-engine crate,
expanding the engine's capability surface for law promotion, metadata
optimization, JSX lowering, resource certificate consumption, semantic
canonical basis computation, and trace fusion.

New modules:
- law_promotion_pack.rs: Law promotion pack assembly and validation for
  policy-driven runtime transformations
- optimized_metadata_substrate.rs: Optimized metadata substrate layer
  providing efficient metadata storage and retrieval for engine internals
- react_jsx_lowering.rs: React JSX lowering pass that transforms JSX
  AST nodes into franken-engine IR, supporting component resolution and
  element construction
- resource_certificate_consumer.rs: Resource certificate consumer that
  validates and applies certificate-based resource authorization
- semantic_canonical_basis.rs: Semantic canonical basis computation for
  deterministic normalization of engine semantic representations
- trace_fusion.rs: Trace fusion engine that merges and optimizes runtime
  execution traces for performance analysis and replay

All modules registered in lib.rs. Three new integration test suites
added for optimized_metadata_substrate, semantic_canonical_basis, and
trace_fusion modules.

execution/stagedsync: enable deferred commitment updates for parallel fork validation (#19749)

## Problem

`SetDeferCommitmentUpdates` was restricted to serial mode (`!parallel`)
during fork (re-org) validation. The restriction existed because the
parallel executor produced intermittent trie root mismatches when
deferred updates were enabled.

Root cause of those mismatches: `applyStorageChanges` used
`blockOriginStorage[key]` (block-start value) as the skip criterion for
`WriteAccountStorage`. This caused MDBX to hold stale intermediate
values after certain intra-block storage patterns, which propagated into
trie root calculations, producing non-deterministic mismatches depending
on execution order.

That underlying bug is fixed in #19748.

## Fix

Remove the `!parallel` guard so both serial and parallel fork validation
benefit from deferred commitment updates. Deferred updates batch trie
root calculations to block boundaries rather than recomputing after
every transaction, significantly reducing re-org validation overhead in
parallel mode.

## Test plan

- [ ] Verify `make erigon` builds cleanly  
- [ ] Run `go test ./execution/stagedsync/...`
- [ ] Parallel fork validation no longer produces trie root mismatches
- [ ] Re-org handling is faster under parallel execution
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

fix: don't abort loop on empty last_assistant_message

If Claude's turn produces only tool calls with no trailing text,
last_assistant_message may be empty. The previous code called
abort_with_warning which deleted the state file — wrong behavior.

fall-through to "continue loop" is the correct response. Add an
explanatory comment and remove the abort path.

commit.message:
fix: stop hook correctness, task gate, compact re-injection, docs

Stop hook (correctness):
- Add stop_hook_active guard at entry point — prevents infinite continuation
  loop when the hook's own block decision re-triggers a Stop event
- Replace transcript-path grep + multi-step jq parsing with direct
  .last_assistant_message field from hook input; removes fragile file I/O
  and 30 lines of defensive transcript-parsing code

Task-completed hook:
- Remove full verify_command execution from TaskCompleted events
- Running the global test suite after every intermediate task penalises
  correct mid-build work for unrelated missing pieces and wastes tokens
- Full dual-gate verification belongs at Stop only; add explanatory comment

SessionStart compact matcher:
- Add second SessionStart hook entry with matcher: "compact" (prompt type)
- Re-injects critical orientation after context compaction: re-read state
  file, re-check TaskList (team) or git log (solo), do not restart

Team mode repositioning:
- README: add "decision rule: solo first" framing; note teams are
  experimental, more expensive, and best for genuine parallel independence
- team.md: add preamble callout clarifying when to use team vs solo

CLAUDE.md cleanup:
- Remove Lead Orchestrator Protocol section (duplicated from team.md)
- Remove Dual-Gate section body (one-line reference is enough)
- Restructure into 3 sections: commands, completion, plugin invariant, dev

- MC Bridge テーブル定義 + クエリ関数（consumed フラグ方式）
- MCP ブリッジツール（メイン側: delegate/status/read_reports、サブ側: report/read_commands）
- サブブレイン専用 MCP サーバー（mc-sub-server.ts）
- Minecraft エージェントプロファイル（全ビルトインツール無効、30秒ポーリング）
- タイマーベース MinecraftEventBuffer（AgentRunner コード変更なし）
- MinecraftContextBuilder（オーバーレイ方式、Guild 非依存）
- サブブレイン行動指針・基礎知識コンテキストファイル
- Bootstrap 統合（config.minecraft 存在時のみ起動）

- consumeBridgeEvents の N+1 UPDATE を inArray による一括 UPDATE に変更

Important:

- MCP ブリッジツールの引数に .min(1).max(10_000) のサイズ制限を追加

Minor:
- "__minecraft__" マジック文字列を MC_SUB_BRAIN_GUILD_ID 定数に抽出
- PRAGMA busy_timeout = 5000 を追加（複数プロセス同時書き込み対策）

Tests:
- mc-bridge クエリ関数のテスト追加（insert/consume/peek/has + 方向フィルタ）
- MinecraftEventBuffer のテスト追加（タイマー・abort・クリーンアップ）
